GroupingProperties.description: An array of EntitySet property names used to group list items, or a `Rule` that returns such an array. Property names not present in the EntitySet are ignored. Ensure that these fields are requested via the OData `$select` in the `QueryOptions` of `Target` so they are returned by the query.

anyOf.description: Expects return of `GroupingProperties` in array format.

Header.description: Configuration for the header displayed above each grouped section. Define one or more `GroupingItem` entries in `Items`. If multiple are provided, only the first is used for rendering. Alternatively, `Items` can be a `Rule` that returns an array of `GroupingItem` objects. Only the first returned item will be rendered.

anyOf.description: One or more `GroupingItem` objects may be defined; only the first is used when rendering.
Expects a `Rule` that returns an array of `GroupingItem` objects; only the first element will be used for rendering.
